title: Cournot Duopoly Game Flow with Imperfect Information
description: A decision flow graph showing the sequence of actions and payoffs for two firms in a Cournot duopoly where each firm chooses its quantity without knowing the other's choice.
relationships: Nature determines market demand/cost information privately
Market price is set based on total output Q = q1 + q2
Profits are calculated based on price, quantity, and cost
